docs/coh-ecosystem-narrative.md:7:The ecosystem functions as both a personal toolkit and a community resource. On one side, it provides automated scripts and documentation to help players install mods—custom enhancements ranging from map overlays showing badge locations to sound replacements for power effects. On the other side, it preserves knowledge about managing Wine environments on modern macOS hardware, helping fellow CoH enthusiasts keep this classic alive. The architecture spans multiple tools: LaunchCat (the Wine wrapper), the official Mod Installer (which converts community downloads into native `.pigg` format), and the game itself, which loads these mods as first-class assets rather than loose file overrides.
docs/coh-ecosystem-narrative.md:15:**Knowledge Preservation**: The CoX-mod-Adventure project documents workflows that could otherwise be lost. When macOS updates break Wine compatibility or file paths shift, this repository serves as a reference for solutions. The `coh-setup.txt` file alone contains hours of debugging insights about MoltenVK graphics, Wine drive mappings, and performance optimization.
docs/coh-ecosystem-narrative.md:31:4. **Installation** — Converted `.pigg` files are placed in `~/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh/assets/mods/`. The game reads them automatically when launched with `-assetpath assets/issue24;assets/live;assets/mods`.
docs/coh-ecosystem-narrative.md:33:5. **Game Launch** — LaunchCat loads the modded client through Wine 9.0 on Intel macOS. The game presents installed mods highlighted in red in the UI, with an "Update" button available for each.

docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:115:## CityVault As Adjacent Inspiration
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:117:CityVault is a Node.js City of Heroes server control panel. Its current README describes automatic launcher manifest generation, user management, character views, an admin dashboard, multi-server support, and game-file hosting/profile configuration. Source: `https://github.com/CaitlynMainer/CityVault/`
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:119:For this project, CityVault is not the thing to clone. It is a useful reference for the larger shape of a CoH control surface:
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:124:- Multi-profile launch settings can inspire future LaunchCat/CoH target awareness.
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:136:| `innate-workflow` | Keep the loop: audit context, select skills, work, then preserve learning. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:137:| `using-superpowers` | Select the relevant skill cluster before each meaningful phase. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:145:| `dogfood` | Verify the browser interactively after design changes. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:151:The local agent library adds a studio workflow around the skills. Use these agents as lenses, not as separate product goals.
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:155:| `tree-explorer` | Map project, runtime, asset, and agent trees before making assumptions. Good for "what is actually in here?" passes. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:156:| `studio-producer` | Keep the work coordinated: prototype lanes, handoffs, dependencies, and what should ship next. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:157:| `ux-researcher` | Define player journeys: discover a mod, compare categories, decide trust, download, install, and return later. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:158:| `ui-designer` | Convert the CoH-native direction into buildable panels, cards, controls, states, and responsive layouts. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:159:| `visual-storyteller` | Make the browser tell the archive story: city map, mission briefing, mod intelligence, local install status. |
docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:160:| `whimsy-injector` | Add restrained delight after core flows work: hover charge, scanline pulse, "acquire module" feedback, empty states. |

/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:84:`CityModInstaller/config.json` currently has `gamepath` set to `z:\Applications\coh\`, with `autoupdate` enabled and `dontCheckforData` enabled. That configured game path should be treated carefully: live game assets are under LaunchCat, while `/Applications/coh` is only an empty convenience path unless LaunchCat or Wine path mapping resolves it indirectly.
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:86:`/Applications/CoHModdingTool.app` contains:
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:88:- `Contents/Resources/CoHModdingTool.exe` - PE32 Windows .NET GUI executable.
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:115:## CityVault As Adjacent Inspiration
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:117:CityVault is a Node.js City of Heroes server control panel. Its current README describes automatic launcher manifest generation, user management, character views, an admin dashboard, multi-server support, and game-file hosting/profile configuration. Source: `https://github.com/CaitlynMainer/CityVault/`
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:119:For this project, CityVault is not the thing to clone. It is a useful reference for the larger shape of a CoH control surface:
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:124:- Multi-profile launch settings can inspire future LaunchCat/CoH target awareness.
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:136:| `innate-workflow` | Keep the loop: audit context, select skills, work, then preserve learning. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:137:| `using-superpowers` | Select the relevant skill cluster before each meaningful phase. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:145:| `dogfood` | Verify the browser interactively after design changes. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:151:The local agent library adds a studio workflow around the skills. Use these agents as lenses, not as separate product goals.
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:155:| `tree-explorer` | Map project, runtime, asset, and agent trees before making assumptions. Good for "what is actually in here?" passes. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:156:| `studio-producer` | Keep the work coordinated: prototype lanes, handoffs, dependencies, and what should ship next. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:157:| `ux-researcher` | Define player journeys: discover a mod, compare categories, decide trust, download, install, and return later. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:158:| `ui-designer` | Convert the CoH-native direction into buildable panels, cards, controls, states, and responsive layouts. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:159:| `visual-storyteller` | Make the browser tell the archive story: city map, mission briefing, mod intelligence, local install status. |
/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/docs/plans/2026-07-13-cox-mod-adventure-context-and-direction.md:160:| `whimsy-injector` | Add restrained delight after core flows work: hover charge, scanline pulse, "acquire module" feedback, empty states. |
